_notes: Press: profile piece, feature article, or year-end best-of list in NYT, Vulture, New Yorker, or Guardian. Special: full-length special on Netflix, HBO Max, Hulu, or YouTube within last 3 years — most recent only. YouTube specials must be 25+ min and clearly labeled as a special.

Whitney Cummings._notes: 'Jokes' (Netflix, July 2022) is outside the 3-year window. 'Mouthy' was released on OnlyFans originally but is also on YouTube (34:26, clearly labeled as a comedy special).

Trae Crowder._notes: 'Trash Daddy' (2025) is on YouTube but only 60 min — need to confirm it's labeled as a special and qualifies. 'Damn Boy!' (2023) is on Prime Video, not a qualifying platform.

Michael McIntyre._notes: '25th Year Stand-Up Special' (2024) is on BBC iPlayer only, not available on qualifying platforms in the US. 'Showman' (Netflix, 2020) is outside the 3-year window.
